hero_typewriter: No matter what happens, always stay dedicated.
bundle_desc: Everything in one bundle. LUTs Pack, Lifestyle Presets and SFXs Combo at a special price.
about_p1: My name is Diego Fontes — Medical student, I work on some projects & practice sports in my free time.
about_p2: I craft clean, modern, and conversion-focused websites that put usability first. With a passion for design systems and scalable solutions, I built Frameblox, a powerful UI kit for Framer that helps designers and creators launch faster without sacrificing quality.
about_p3: My work blends strategy, design, and interaction to create digital experiences that not only look beautiful but perform beautifully too.
